name: Easy Cassoulet
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, cook the sausage, onion, and garlic until the meat is slightly browned and the onion is tender. Drain off any excess fat.
2. Add the ham, parsley, and bay leaf to the skillet; mix well.
3. Stir in the undrained beans, white wine, and ground cloves.
4. Transfer the mixture to a 1-1/2 quart casserole dish.
5. Cover and bake at 325°F for 45 minutes.
6. Uncover and bake an additional 40 to 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Remove the bay leaf before serving in bowls with hot corn bread, if desired.
